title: ononis viscosa var. pitardii
intro: Ononis viscosa var. pitardii, also known as the sticky wild medick, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Ononis viscosa var. pitardii include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
